description: User pauses to examine the 'Short tasks & surveys' section, specifically hovering over the 'AI Interview' task card.
frame_description: The user is viewing a Figma prototype showing various research opportunities.

description: User clicks on the 'Askable Sessions' browser tab to switch from the prototype to the session instructions.
The instruction text on the Askable Sessions page updates dynamically to a new question for the participant.
frame_description: The central text on the dark background changes from a general question to a specific one about survey time.

description: User clicks on the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' browser tab to return to the Figma prototype.
